front:
SKILL 11 вҖ” LATERAL POSITION вҖ” TURNING RESIDENT TOWARDS YOU
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Pillows
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Move resident to FAR side of bed first вҖ” gives rolling space toward you
вӯҗ One hand on FAR SHOULDER, one on FAR HIP вҖ” roll toward you in one smooth motion
вӯҗ Pillow BEHIND back (prevents rolling backward) + pillow BETWEEN knees
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise BOTH side rails. Raise bed. Flatten head section.
4. Fan-fold linens. Place pillow at HEAD of bed.
5. Stand at side you want resident to roll TOWARD. Feet 12 inches apart, knees slightly bent.
6. вӯҗ Move resident to FAR side of bed вҖ” away from you (gives room to roll toward you).
7. Cross FAR ARM over chest. Tuck near arm safely. Cross FAR LEG over near leg.
8. вӯҗ One hand on FAR SHOULDER, other on FAR HIP. Back straight. Bend at hips/knees. Roll resident SMOOTHLY TOWARD YOU in one controlled motion вҖ” on their side facing you.
9. вӯҗ Slide pillow BEHIND resident's BACK (fills gap, prevents backward roll). Place pillow BETWEEN KNEES. Prop upper arm if needed.
10. Pillow under HEAD AND NECK (ear to shoulder).
11. Check spine alignment вҖ” neutral straight line? Top hip relaxed? Comfortable?
12. Adjust clothing, linens, tubing.
13. Lower bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
14. Call light within reach. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 12 вҖ” LATERAL POSITION вҖ” TURNING RESIDENT AWAY FROM YOU
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Pillows
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Move resident to NEAR side first вҖ” gives rolling space away from you
вӯҗ One hand under NEAR SHOULDER, one under NEAR HIP вҖ” roll away like a log
вӯҗ Pillow BEHIND back + pillow BETWEEN knees after positioning
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise BOTH side rails. Raise bed. Flatten head section.
4. Fan-fold linens. Place pillow at HEAD of bed.
5. Stand at side. Feet 12 inches apart, knees slightly bent.
6. вӯҗ Move resident to NEAR side of bed вҖ” closest to you (gives room to roll away).
7. Cross NEAREST ARM over chest. Cross NEAREST LEG over far leg.
8. вӯҗ One hand UNDER NEAREST SHOULDER, other UNDER NEAREST HIP. Back straight, bend at hips/knees. Roll resident AWAY from you вҖ” smooth log roll to far side.
9. вӯҗ Pillow BEHIND resident's BACK. Pillow BETWEEN KNEES. Support upper arm if needed.
10. Adjust pillow under HEAD AND NECK.
11. Check spine alignment вҖ” neutral? Top hip relaxed? Comfortable?
12. Adjust clothing, linens, tubing.
13. Lower bed. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
14. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 13 вҖ” PASSIVE RANGE OF MOTION (PROM)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Support limb on BOTH SIDES of the joint being moved at all times
вӯҗ Move GENTLY, SLOWLY, SMOOTHLY вҖ” stop at FIRST RESISTANCE or ANY sign of pain
вӯҗ Each movement performed AT LEAST 3 TIMES
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain each movement BEFORE doing it.
3. Privacy. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust to working height.
4. Resident lies FLAT SUPINE вҖ” head/spine/hips/legs aligned.
5. вӯҗ Before every movement: support limb on BOTH SIDES of joint. Move GENTLY, SLOWLY, SMOOTHLY. Stop at RESISTANCE or any pain. Perform each move вүҘ3 TIMES.

SHOULDER (support elbow + wrist):
вҖў Flexion: raise arm forward and up to 90В°
вҖў Extension: lower back to side
вҖў Abduction: sweep arm out sideways to 90В°
вҖў Adduction: bring arm back to center

ELBOW (support wrist + elbow):
вҖў Flexion: bend elbow вҖ” forearm to shoulder
вҖў Extension: straighten back out flat
вҖў Pronation: rotate palm DOWN
вҖў Supination: rotate palm UP

WRIST (hold wrist steady, guide hand):
вҖў Flexion: push fingers DOWNWARD
вҖў Dorsiflexion: push fingers BACK toward forearm
вҖў Radial: tilt toward thumb side
вҖў Ulnar: tilt toward pinky side

THUMB: Abduction/Adduction/Opposition (touch each fingertip)/Flexion/Extension

FINGERS: Flexion (fist)/Extension (open)/Abduction (spread)/Adduction (close)

HIP (support knee + ankle):
вҖў Abduction: slide leg OUT sideways
вҖў Adduction: slide back across center
вҖў Internal rotation: roll leg inward (toes toward other leg)
вҖў External rotation: roll leg outward

KNEES (support under knee + ankle):
вҖў Flexion: bend knee вҖ” heel toward buttocks
вҖў Extension: straighten leg flat

ANKLES (cup heel + top of foot):
вҖў Dorsiflexion: push top of foot UP toward shin ("toes to nose")
вҖў Plantar flexion: push sole DOWN (ballet toe)
вҖў Supination: sole rotates inward
вҖў Pronation: sole rotates outward

TOES: Flexion/Extension/Abduction/Adduction

Ending:
вҖў Comfortable position. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order.
вҖў Call light. Wash hands.
вҖў вӯҗ Report any DECREASED range of motion or PAIN. Document noting stiffness/pain.

front:
SKILL 14 вҖ” TRANSFERRING RESIDENT WITH MECHANICAL LIFT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Mechanical lift, sling, robe/slippers if used, chair/wheelchair
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Lock WHEELCHAIR brakes вҖ” both sides click firmly before positioning
вӯҗ Sling edge at BACK, bottom at BACK OF KNEES вҖ” spread fully like a hammock
вӯҗ Raise ONLY 2 inches above mattress вҖ” pause before moving; LEAVE SLING IN CHAIR after transfer
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly.
3. Privacy. Scan area вҖ” clear path, no furniture in way.
4. Lock all bed wheels. Raise BOTH side rails.
5. вӯҗ Roll WHEELCHAIR to bedside. Press BOTH BRAKE LEVERS DOWN вҖ” wheels must not spin.
6. вӯҗ Help resident turn toward you. Go to FAR side. Slide SLING under resident вҖ” edge at BACK, bottom at BACK OF KNEES. Roll resident back. Spread sling fully вҖ” hammock shape under them.
7. Roll lift to bedside. Widen base to WIDEST "V" position. Push base UNDER bed. Overhead bar directly above resident's torso.
8. вӯҗ Attach sling loops/straps to overhead bar вҖ” one set per side. Check ALL connections. Fold resident's arms over chest.
9. Pump/electric control to RAISE resident. Stop 2 INCHES above mattress. PAUSE вҖ” let resident gain balance. Speak calmly.
10. Coworker stands on other side вҖ” guides and supports as lift rolls. Move until resident is DIRECTLY OVER wheelchair seat.
11. Slowly LOWER into chair. Coworker pushes DOWN on KNEES to guide proper seated position.
12. Unhook straps. LEAVE SLING IN PLACE вҖ” do not remove.
13. Hips fully back in chair seat. Remove privacy. Side rails per order.
14. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 15 вҖ” ASSISTING RESIDENT TO AMBULATE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Nonskid shoes, gait belt
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Gait belt over CLOTHING, snug вҖ” flat hand fits under, but NOT a fist
вӯҗ Stand on WEAKER SIDE, slightly behind вҖ” hand on BACK of gait belt at all times
вӯҗ Sit resident at edge of bed 1-2 minutes before standing вҖ” watch for dizziness
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly.
3. Privacy. Lower bed to LOWEST. Lock wheels. Raise head. Help resident sit at edge вҖ” BOTH FEET FLAT on floor. PAUSE 1-2 minutes вҖ” watch for dizziness.
4. Apply NONSKID SHOES вҖ” both feet. Fasten completely.
5. Stand DIRECTLY IN FRONT. Feet shoulder-width apart.
6. вӯҗ Wrap GAIT BELT around waist OVER clothing. Snug вҖ” flat hand fits, not fist. No pinched skin. Grasp BOTH SIDES with underhand grip (thumbs up).
7. Block resident's knees with your knees if needed. Bend your knees. Back straight.
8. Tell resident: "Lean forward, push hands into mattress. Stand on three." 1-2-3 вҖ” belt UP, shift weight, resident pushes. Rise TOGETHER.
9. вӯҗ Pivot to stand BESIDE resident вҖ” NOT in front. Walk SLIGHTLY BEHIND and to the SIDE. Hand on BACK of gait belt at all times. Stand on WEAKER SIDE.
10. Watch feet, posture, breathing. "Eyes forward, not down."
11. Walk full ordered distance. Guide back. Lower safely. Remove belt. Check alignment.
12. Bed to lowest. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 16 вҖ” ASSISTING TO AMBULATE вҖ” CANE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gait belt, nonskid shoes, cane
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Cane in STRONGER/UNAFFECTED hand
вӯҗ Stand on WEAK SIDE, slightly behind вҖ” hand on BACK of gait belt
вӯҗ Pattern: CANE FORWARD вҶ’ WEAK STEP вҶ’ STRONG STEP (repeat)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lower bed to LOWEST. Lock wheels. Help sit at edge вҖ” feet flat.
4. Apply NONSKID SHOES. Fasten.
5. Stand directly in front. Gait belt over clothing, snug, underhand grip.
6. Help to standing (block knees if needed, count "1-2-3").
7. вӯҗ Place CANE in resident's STRONGER/UNAFFECTED HAND. Handle facing up.
8. вӯҗ Move to WEAK SIDE вҖ” slightly BEHIND. Grasp BACK of gait belt.
9. вӯҗ Instruct cane walking pattern:
   вҖў CANE FORWARD ~6 inches (tripod plant ahead)
   вҖў WEAK LEG steps EVEN WITH cane tip
   вҖў STRONG LEG steps PAST cane
   вҖў REPEAT: CANE вҶ’ WEAK вҶ’ STRONG
10. Walk on weak side. Eyes forward. Call out obstacles.
11. Encourage rest if tired. Resident sets pace.
12. Return to bed/chair. Lower safely. Remove belt. Check alignment.
13. Bed to lowest. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 17 вҖ” ASSISTING TO AMBULATE вҖ” WALKER
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gait belt, nonskid shoes, walker
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Walker placed DIRECTLY IN FRONT вҖ” resident grasps both handles
вӯҗ Stand on WEAK SIDE, slightly behind вҖ” hand on BACK of gait belt
вӯҗ Pattern: WALKER FORWARD вҶ’ WEAK STEP вҶ’ STRONG STEP (ALL 4 feet on floor before stepping)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lower bed to LOWEST. Lock wheels. Help sit at edge вҖ” feet flat.
4. Apply NONSKID SHOES. Fasten.
5. Stand directly in front. Gait belt over clothing, snug, underhand grip.
6. Help to standing (block knees if needed, count "1-2-3").
7. вӯҗ Place WALKER directly IN FRONT of resident вҖ” grasp BOTH HANDLES.
8. вӯҗ Move to WEAK SIDE вҖ” slightly BEHIND. Grasp BACK of gait belt.
9. вӯҗ Instruct walker walking pattern:
   вҖў LIFT/ROLL walker FORWARD ~6 inches
   вҖў ALL FOUR FEET firmly on floor before stepping (no rocking/tipping)
   вҖў WEAK LEG steps FORWARD into walker space
   вҖў STRONG LEG steps EVEN WITH or past weak leg
   вҖў REPEAT: WALKER FORWARD вҶ’ WEAK вҶ’ STRONG
10. Walk on weak side. Eyes forward. Watch for obstacles.
11. Encourage rest if tired. Resident sets pace.
12. Return. Lower safely. Remove belt. Check alignment.
13. Bed to lowest. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 18 вҖ” TRANSFERRING BED TO CHAIR/WHEELCHAIR
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Chair/wheelchair, gait belt, nonskid footwear, robe or blanket
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Wheelchair on STRONG SIDE at foot of bed, diagonal to bed, ARM nearly touching вҖ” BOTH brakes locked
вӯҗ Gait belt snug over clothing вҖ” flat hand fits under, block knees on "three"
вӯҗ Guide until BACKS OF LEGS touch wheelchair seat edge before lowering
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Clear path.
3. Lock bed wheels. Raise head of bed fully вҖ” resident sitting upright. Lower bed to LOWEST вҖ” feet flat.
4. Help swing legs to edge вҖ” sit upright. BOTH FEET FLAT on floor. PAUSE 1-2 min вҖ” watch for dizziness.
5. вӯҗ Position wheelchair at FOOT of bed, angled diagonally facing head of bed, on resident's STRONG SIDE. Arm nearly touching bed side. Press BOTH BRAKE LEVERS вҖ” wheels locked.
6. Flip up or remove footrest on side nearest bed.
7. вӯҗ CONFIRM both wheelchair wheels locked вҖ” try pushing.
8. Apply NONSKID SHOES вҖ” both feet. Fasten.
9. Stand DIRECTLY IN FRONT. Feet shoulder-width.
10. вӯҗ Wrap GAIT BELT over clothing. Snug вҖ” flat hand fits. Check no pinched skin. Underhand grip, thumbs up.
11. Tell resident: "Push off bed with hands and lean forward." Press your knees against theirs. Back straight, bend at hips/knees. "1-2-3" вҖ” gait belt UP, resident pushes вҖ” RISE TOGETHER.
12. Guide small shuffling steps вҖ” resident rotates back toward wheelchair until BACKS OF LEGS touch seat front edge.
13. Resident grasps BOTH ARMRESTS. Slowly LOWER into chair вҖ” bend your knees, gait belt guides descent.
14. Slide hips fully AGAINST SEAT BACK. Flip footrests. Place feet on rests. Check alignment. Remove belt.
15. Remove privacy. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 19 вҖ” TRANSFERRING WHEELCHAIR TO TOILET
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Toilet, gait belt, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ STRONG SIDE nearest toilet вҖ” resident pivots on strong side
вӯҗ Block resident's knees with yours вҖ” feet outside theirs вҖ” prevent buckling
вӯҗ Pivot on STRONG SIDE until backs of legs touch toilet edge, then lower
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy вҖ” close bathroom door.
3. вӯҗ Roll wheelchair next to toilet вҖ” STRONG SIDE nearest toilet (pivot on that side). Lock wheelchair. Swing/remove footrests. BOTH FEET FLAT on floor.
4. Gait belt around waist over clothing. Snug. Adjust clothing for toileting.
5. вӯҗ Stand FACING resident. Feet 12 inches apart, placed OUTSIDE and alongside resident's feet. Bend knees вҖ” your knees/shins against FRONT of resident's knees (blocking buckling). Grasp gait belt underhand, thumbs up. Back straight.
6. "1-2-3" вҖ” resident leans forward, pushes off armrests. You pull belt UPWARD and slightly toward you. Rise to standing.
7. вӯҗ PIVOT on STRONG SIDE toward toilet вҖ” small shuffling steps. Guide until BACKS OF LEGS touch FRONT EDGE of toilet. Centered in front of bowl.
8. Resident grasps GRAB BARS on both sides. Adjust clothing. Slowly LOWER onto seat вҖ” bend YOUR knees, gait belt guides descent.
9. Call light within arm's reach. CLOSE bathroom door.
10. Stay NEARBY. Re-enter when signaled.
11. Gloves on. While standing: perineal care вҖ” FRONT TO BACK. Pat dry.
12. Remove gloves. Adjust clothing.
13. REVERSE procedure вҖ” gait belt, "1-2-3", pivot on strong side, lower into wheelchair.
14. Remove privacy. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 20 вҖ” MEASURING HEIGHT AND WEIGHT (AMBULATORY)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Scale
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Balance bar must FLOAT LEVEL at zero before resident steps on
вӯҗ Read weight: large slider first (dip then back 1 notch), then small slider until bar floats вҖ” must be within 1 LB
вӯҗ Read height at horizontal arm вҖ” must be accurate within Вј INCH; help resident step off BEFORE recording
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Check resident's nonskid shoes вҖ” on and fastened. Walk to scale.
4. вӯҗ Check balance bar вҖ” must FLOAT LEVEL. If off, slide BOTH indicators to ZERO вҖ” bar should level.
5. Help resident step ONTO scale platform, facing AWAY from readout.
6. вӯҗ Move LARGE slider right (in increments) until bar dips DOWN, then back ONE notch. Move SMALL slider right (small increments) until bar FLOATS LEVEL вҖ” hovering in middle. READ both numbers and ADD TOGETHER = weight. Must be within 1 LB.
7. Resident stands STRAIGHT AND TALL вҖ” chin level, eyes forward.
8. Pull UP measuring rod from back of scale. Slowly LOWER horizontal arm until it rests FLAT on TOP of head.
9. вӯҗ Read measurement where arm meets rod. Must be within Вј INCH.
10. вӯҗ BEFORE recording: help resident STEP OFF SCALE SAFELY. Hold arm. Rod doesn't swing down on them.
11. Wash hands. Call light. WRITE DOWN height AND weight.
12. Report changes to nurse.
